---
title: "Data snapshots"
subtitle: "Every vintage is a release artifact. Browse, download, cite."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

## What's here

Every pipeline on this platform writes a versioned Parquet snapshot on each run. The snapshots accumulate in `data/processed/`; a `MANIFEST.json` records each one with its vintage, sha256, and row count. Once a year, the accumulated snapshots are bundled into a Zenodo deposit with a versioned DOI, which is the preferred citation target for researchers.

## Snapshots on disk

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

# Quarto's Jupyter kernel has no __file__. Paths are resolved from the cwd
# Quarto sets during render — the .qmd file's directory (site/).
manifest_path = Path("..") / "data" / "processed" / "MANIFEST.json"
if manifest_path.exists():
    with manifest_path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        manifest = json.load(f)
    print(f"Series: {manifest.get('series', '(unknown)')}")
    print()
    print(f"{'Vintage':<10} {'Rows':>7}  {'File':<50}")
    print("-" * 72)
    for entry in manifest.get("entries", []):
        vintage = entry.get("vintage", "?")
        rows = entry.get("rows", "?")
        file = entry.get("file", "?")
        print(f"{vintage:<10} {rows:>7}  {file:<50}")
else:
    print("No manifest yet. The first successful monthly BLS refresh populates this.")
```

## How to cite

Prefer the versioned Zenodo DOI when one exists. Until the first annual deposit, cite the repository directly using the [CITATION.cff](https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/CITATION.cff) file and the relevant commit SHA.

## License

All derived data: [CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). See [LICENSE-DATA](https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/blob/main/LICENSE-DATA.md) for the source-by-source breakdown.
